title: Define healthcare output contract and exports
description: Current: the codebase has vertical output types and exports for fintech/saas but no healthcare contract. Expected: a typed BrandHealthcareOutput contract and matching exports exist so downstream generator/tool code can compile cleanly.
acceptance_criteria: BrandHealthcareOutput interface is added with healthcare-specific fields aligned to existing vertical patterns
branding-core index exports generateBrandHealthcare symbol placeholder/target export path consistently
top-level src/index.ts type exports include BrandHealthcareOutput without type errors
completion_summary: Confirmed BrandHealthcareOutput type and exports are present in shared, branding-core, and top-level type surface.
